shipping.title: Shipping policy
paragraphs: Pan-India shipping. Processing 1–2 business days. Carriers and SLAs to be finalized at launch.
Free shipping applies on carts above ₹999.

returns.title: Return and refund policy
paragraphs: Placeholder policy text. Replace with legal-reviewed copy. Outline eligibility windows, hygiene exceptions, and refund timelines tied to payment settlements.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
paragraphs: Placeholder. Describe data collected (orders, analytics), lawful basis, retention, subprocessors (hosting, payments, email), and user rights.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
paragraphs: Placeholder governing law, site use, product disclaimers, and limitation of liability.

cancellation.title: Cancellation policy
paragraphs: Orders may be cancellable before dispatch. Post-dispatch, returns follow the return policy.
See our returns and refund policy for post-dispatch cases.
